name: mena-job-command-center
description: Design-prototype PWA for a MENA-focused job-search command center. The UI is Arabic-first, RTL, mobile-first, and served by a small Rust/Axum backend.

scripts.check:functions: node --check functions/api/bootstrap.js && node --check functions/api/_state.js && node --check functions/api/me/state.js && node --check functions/api/ghostwriter.js && node --check functions/api/ai-writer-chat.js && node --check functions/api/resume-coach.js && node --check functions/api/export-package.js && node --check functions/api/auth/_auth.js && node --check functions/api/auth/google/start.js && node --check functions/api/auth/google/callback.js && node --check functions/api/auth/session.js && node --check functions/api/auth/logout.js && node --check functions/api/auth/signup.js && node --check "functions/api/[[route]].js"
scripts.check:all: npm run check:contract && npm run check:js && npm run check:pwa && npm run check:functions && npm run check:ingestion
scripts.deploy: npm run check:all && wrangler pages deploy public --project-name jobs-wasfai --commit-dirty=true
